chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1005 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 14-10-2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. The instant Constitutional Petition was filed in the year, 2022 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 06-12-2022, thereafter no concrete efforts were made either by the Petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court. Today when the matter came up before the Court, nobody has turned up to proceed with this matter, which is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
